AI has the potential to do for intellectual work what modern machinery did for physical labor. 

America should lead that future. https://t.co/6jZtkiFGAx

One of AI's greatest promises isn't replacing people, it's expanding opportunity.

Whether it's personalized education, legal guidance, or health information, AI can give millions of people access to services that were once available only to those with money.

Technology changes https://t.co/OH4ky8sSz9

Energy multiplied what humans could build with their hands, and now AI has the potential to multiply what humans can create with their minds.

Accelerating research, innovation, and problem solving across every industry is how societies become more prosperous. https://t.co/4RNuhFLnBM
